title: Forsetti Agentic Edition Compliance Report
description: Schema for compliance reports in the Forsetti Agentic Edition governance workflow.

task_reference.description: Reference to the task contract being evaluated.

acting_role.description: The role that performed the work under review.

compliance_status.description: Overall compliance outcome of the review.

blocking_issues.description: List of issues that block completion.

missing_requirements.description: List of requirements that have not been met.

release_status.description: Whether the change has been classified for release.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes from the reviewer.
